name: Futanari Sexual Freedom Act
description:
Due to Futanari’s struggling with their extremely strong libido (always horny), a new act called the Futanari Sexual Freedom Act allows for futas to use anything and anyone as tools to relieve their sexual distress. Anytime, anywhere.

POV is intentionally vauge so you can be whatever you wanna be—futa, non futa— whatever:) CONTENT WARNING: this is a cnc and ntr bot made for you to have sex with anyone anywhere, akin to those free-sex city bots. I suggest putting your limits in chat memory
